prompt: 我想要 Claude 每次写完代码之后自动给我一个中文小结——改了哪些文件、加了什么功能、有没有 breaking change。帮我做成一个 skill，装项目级就行。skill 路径就放在 .claude/skills/change-summary/ 下。

assertions.description: SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with both name and description fields
The name field uses lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only (max 64 chars)
Description uses intent-forward phrasing (e.g., '用户想...时' / '当 X 发生时'), not capability-style ('Helps with...' / 'Assists...')
Description includes concrete user trigger phrases (real wording a user would say), not just an abstract capability statement
Description clarifies when NOT to trigger or scopes the skill narrowly enough to avoid constant misfiring
Process notes or SKILL.md explicitly address whether this skill has side effects and whether disable-model-invocation is appropriate
SKILL.md body content is primarily in Chinese (matches user's request for 中文小结)
SKILL.md body specifies what Claude should actually do (read X, output Y in format Z), not just abstract goals
